summary_en: 2,100 shares at ¥6.72M total (0.52% of shares outstanding) via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-18 at reference price ¥3,200/share. Single-block execution.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Purchase of Treasury Shares via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Yottavias Co., Ltd. (ticker 5598, TOKYO PRO Market) announced on 2026-05-15 that its board of directors resolved to acquire 2,100 treasury shares for a total of ¥6.72 million. The acquisition will be executed via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours trading) on 2026-05-18 at 08:45 JST at the reference price of ¥3,200 per share. This represents 0.52% of shares outstanding (calculated against 400,000 issued shares excluding treasury stock as of 2026-01-31). The stated purpose is to enable future flexible capital allocation by leveraging debt-funded share repurchase to enhance corporate value. The order is limited to the specified trading time and may be partially or fully unexecuted depending on market conditions.
